heading.description: Card heading accepted by the current smart_layout generation path.

description.description: Specific explanatory sentence for the card.
description.example: This card explains one concrete part of the lesson objective clearly.

icon_name.description: Optional Remix Icon class accepted by the current smart_layout item mapping.

items.heading: Core Idea
items.description: This card explains one concrete part of the lesson objective clearly.

items.heading: Useful Detail
items.description: This card connects the idea to a practical learning outcome.

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Items must use fields accepted by the current smart_layout item mapping.
Each primary item description must be 12-15 words.
